title: Senior Revenue Manager at Best Western India

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Best Western India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Best Western India in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Best Western India:
Best Western India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Best Western India!
